glosses.en: to attend; to go to regularly

sentences.target: Je fréquente ce café du coin.

translations.fr: Je fréquente ce café du coin.
translations.en: I go to this café often.
translations.es: Voy mucho a este café de la esquina.
translations.de: Ich gehe oft in dieses Café an der Ecke.
translations.it: Vado spesso a questo caffè all'angolo.
translations.ko: 나는 이 모퉁이 카페에 자주 가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我常去这家街角咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我成日去呢間街角咖啡店。
translations.ru: Я часто хожу в это кафе на углу.
translations.pt: Eu vou muito a este café da esquina.
translations.he: אני הולך לעיתים קרובות לבית הקפה שבפינה.
translations.tr: Bu köşe kafeye sık sık giderim.
translations.vi: Tôi thường đi đến quán cà phê ở góc này.
translations.ar: أذهب كثيرًا إلى هذا المقهى في الزاوية.
translations.nl: Ik ga vaak naar dat café op de hoek.
translations.uk: Я часто ходжу до цього кафе на розі.
translations.hu: Gyakran járok ebbe a sarki kávézóba.
translations.hi: मैं इस नुक्कड़ वाले कैफ़े में अक्सर जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Często chodzę do tej kawiarni na rogu.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω συχνά σε αυτό το καφέ στη γωνία.
translations.nb: Jeg går ofte på kaféen på hjørnet.
translations.id: Saya sering pergi ke kafe di sudut ini.
translations.sv: Jag går ofta till kaféet på hörnet.
translations.ro: Merg des la cafeneaua din colț.
translations.cs: Často chodím do té kavárny na rohu.
translations.da: Jeg går ofte på caféen på hjørnet.
translations.ja: よくこの角のカフェに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb meaning ‘to go to regularly’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘café’ to specify a particular referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Contraction of ‘de’ + ‘le’; preposition introducing the noun complement ‘du coin’ (genitival/locational relation).
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’ in the NP ‘du coin’.

sentences.target: Tu fréquentes la bibliothèque le soir.

translations.fr: Tu fréquentes la bibliothèque le soir.
translations.en: You go to the library in the evening.
translations.es: Vas a la biblioteca por las tardes.
translations.de: Du gehst abends in die Bibliothek.
translations.pt: Você vai à biblioteca à noite.
translations.vi: Bạn đi thư viện vào buổi tối.
translations.nl: Je gaat 's avonds naar de bibliotheek.
translations.hi: तुम शाम को पुस्तकालय जाते हो.
translations.nb: Du går på biblioteket om kvelden.
translations.id: Kamu pergi ke perpustakaan pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Du går till biblioteket på kvällen.
translations.da: Du går på biblioteket om aftenen.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; clitic subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun ‘bibliothèque’.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; with a temporal noun it marks habitual time (‘le soir’ = in the evenings).
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal noun functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Il aime fréquenter les petits commerces.

translations.fr: Il aime fréquenter les petits commerces.
translations.en: He likes to visit small shops.
translations.es: Le gusta ir a las tiendas pequeñas.
translations.de: Er geht gern in kleine Läden.
translations.it: Gli piace andare nei piccoli negozi.
translations.ko: 그는 작은 가게들을 다니는 것을 좋아해.
translations.ru: Он любит заходить в маленькие магазины.
translations.pt: Ele gosta de visitar lojas pequenas.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thích đi các cửa hàng nhỏ.
translations.nl: Hij gaat graag naar kleine winkels.
translations.uk: Він любить заходити до маленьких крамниць.
translations.hi: उसे छोटी दुकानों में जाना पसंद है.
translations.el: Του αρέσει να πηγαίνει σε μικρά μαγαζιά.
translations.nb: Han liker å gå i små butikker.
translations.sv: Han gillar att gå i små butiker.
translations.ro: Îi place să meargă la magazinele mici.
translations.da: Han kan godt lide at gå i små butikker.
translations.ja: 彼は小さな店に行くのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a non-finite complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘aime’ (verbal noun-like use).
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun phrase ‘les petits commerces’.
Attributive adjective, masculine plural; agrees with ‘commerces’ in gender and number.
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the direct object of ‘fréquenter’.

sentences.target: Nous fréquentons ce parc le dimanche.

translations.fr: Nous fréquentons ce parc le dimanche.
translations.en: We go to this park on Sundays.
translations.es: Vamos a este parque los domingos.
translations.de: Wir gehen sonntags in diesen Park.
translations.it: Andiamo in questo parco la domenica.
translations.yue: 我哋星期日會去呢個公園。
translations.ru: Мы по воскресеньям ходим в этот парк.
translations.pt: Vamos a este parque aos domingos.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לפארק הזה בימי ראשון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi đến công viên này vào Chủ nhật.
translations.ar: نذهب إلى هذا المتنزه أيام الأحد.
translations.nl: We gaan op zondagen naar dit park.
translations.uk: Ми щонеділі ходимо до цього парку.
translations.hi: हम रविवार को इस पार्क में जाते हैं।
translations.pl: W niedziele chodzimy do tego parku.
translations.el: Πηγαίνουμε σε αυτό το πάρκο τις Κυριακές.
translations.nb: Vi går til denne parken på søndager.
translations.id: Kami pergi ke taman ini pada hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Vi går till den här parken på söndagar.
translations.cs: V neděli chodíme do tohoto parku.
translations.da: Vi går i denne park om søndagen.
translations.ja: 日曜日はこの公園に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘parc’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; with a day of the week marks habitual occurrence (‘le dimanche’ = on Sundays).
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal noun functioning as an adverbial complement.
